{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subscribenten ausgeläuffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annotationibus Henrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median- Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE></BIBL> künfftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preiß aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":14,"explanation":"Fixed the following issues:
1. Replaced corrupted encoding "Buchl√ë√ßden" with "Buchläden"
2. Fixed "Subseribenten" (OCR error) to "Subscribenten"
3. Fixed "ausgel√ë√∫ffert" to "ausgeläuffert"
4. Fixed "Annokationibus" to "Annotationibus" (likely OCR error)
5. Fixed "Honrici" to "Henrici" (proper name correction)
6. Escaped unescaped ampersand "&c." to "&c."
7. Fixed "T. Lieium" to "T. Livium" (Livy, correcting OCR error)
8. Escaped unescaped ampersand "&" to "&" in "Sigonii & Gronovior"
9. Fixed corrupted "sch√ë‚àÇn" to "schön"
10. Fixed corrupted "√ë‚Ä†" symbol to "à" (price indicator)
11. Closed the second BIBL tag properly (was left unclosed, causing structural issue) - moved closing tag after PRIZE
12. Fixed "k√ë√∫nfftige" to "künfftige"
13. Fixed "Prei√∫" to "Preiß" and "w√ë√ßhret" to "währet"/"bi√∫" to "biß"
14. Fixed "Eremplar" (OCR error) to "Exemplar"

The overall XML structure was valid (all tags properly nested), but the second BIBL element was missing its closing tag, and there were numerous character encoding corruptions (likely from UTF-8/Latin-1 mismatch) throughout the text that were restored to their correct German/Latin forms."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subscribenten ausgeläuffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annotationibus Henrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median- Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE></BIBL> künfftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preiß aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
Fixed the following issues:
1. Replaced corrupted encoding "Buchl√ë√ßden" with "Buchläden"
2. Fixed "Subseribenten" (OCR error) to "Subscribenten"
3. Fixed "ausgel√ë√∫ffert" to "ausgeläuffert"
4. Fixed "Annokationibus" to "Annotationibus" (likely OCR error)
5. Fixed "Honrici" to "Henrici" (proper name correction)
6. Escaped unescaped ampersand "&c." to "&c."
7. Fixed "T. Lieium" to "T. Livium" (Livy, correcting OCR error)
8. Escaped unescaped ampersand "&" to "&" in "Sigonii & Gronovior"
9. Fixed corrupted "sch√ë‚àÇn" to "schön"
10. Fixed corrupted "√ë‚Ä†" symbol to "à" (price indicator)
11. Closed the second BIBL tag properly (was left unclosed, causing structural issue) - moved closing tag after PRIZE
12. Fixed "k√ë√∫nfftige" to "künfftige"
13. Fixed "Prei√∫" to "Preiß" and "w√ë√ßhret" to "währet"/"bi√∫" to "biß"
14. Fixed "Eremplar" (OCR error) to "Exemplar"

The overall XML structure was valid (all tags properly nested), but the second BIBL element was missing its closing tag, and there were numerous character encoding corruptions (likely from UTF-8/Latin-1 mismatch) throughout the text that were restored to their correct German/Latin forms.
